patterns.name: JWT Security Filter Chain
keyFacts: JwtFilter must extend OncePerRequestFilter
Add JWT filter BEFORE UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter in SecurityFilterChain
Use @EnableWebSecurity on SecurityConfig class
Disable CSRF for stateless REST APIs: http.csrf(csrf -> csrf.disable())
Use SecurityContextHolder.getContext().setAuthentication() to set the auth

patterns.name: CORS Global Config
keyFacts: Configure CORS in SecurityConfig, NOT with @CrossOrigin (not global)
Use CorsConfigurationSource bean for fine-grained control
Always specify allowed origins explicitly — do not use * with credentials
Register cors config: http.cors(cors -> cors.configurationSource(corsBean))
patterns.snippet: @Bean CorsConfigurationSource corsConfigurationSource() { CorsConfiguration cfg = new CorsConfiguration(); cfg.setAllowedOrigins(List.of("http://localhost:3000")); cfg.setAllowedMethods(List.of("*")); return request -> cfg; }

patterns.name: Global Exception Handler
keyFacts: Use @ControllerAdvice + @ExceptionHandler for global error handling
Return ResponseEntity with proper HTTP status codes
Create custom exceptions extending RuntimeException
Handle MethodArgumentNotValidException for @Valid failures
Log errors at WARN/ERROR level — don't swallow stack traces
patterns.snippet: @ControllerAdvice public class GlobalExceptionHandler { @ExceptionHandler(ResourceNotFoundException.class) public ResponseEntity<ErrorResponse> handleNotFound(ResourceNotFoundException ex) { return ResponseEntity.status(404).body(new ErrorResponse(ex.getMessage())); } }

patterns.name: JPA Lazy Loading Fix
keyFacts: LazyInitializationException = accessing lazy collection outside transaction
Fix 1: Add @Transactional to service method
Fix 2: Use JOIN FETCH in JPQL query
Fix 3: Use @EntityGraph on repository method
Never use FetchType.EAGER as default — it causes N+1 problems
patterns.snippet: @Query("SELECT u FROM User u JOIN FETCH u.orders WHERE u.id = :id") Optional<User> findByIdWithOrders(@Param("id") Long id);

patterns.name: Spring Validation Pattern
keyFacts: Add @Valid on @RequestBody parameter to trigger validation
Use @NotNull, @NotBlank, @Size, @Email, @Min, @Max on DTO fields
Handle MethodArgumentNotValidException in @ControllerAdvice
Use @Validated on class for method-level validation
Return field-level error messages in response body

patterns.name: Constructor Injection
keyFacts: Prefer constructor injection over @Autowired field injection
Constructor injection: add final to fields, generate constructor
Use @RequiredArgsConstructor from Lombok to reduce boilerplate
Field injection makes testing harder — you can't inject mocks
Circular dependency with constructor injection = design smell, refactor
patterns.snippet: @Service @RequiredArgsConstructor public class UserService { private final UserRepository userRepository; private final PasswordEncoder passwordEncoder; }

patterns.name: Pagination Pattern
keyFacts: Use Pageable parameter in repository methods
Pass PageRequest.of(page, size, Sort.by('createdAt').descending())
Return Page<T> or Slice<T> from repository
Map Page<Entity> to Page<DTO> using page.map(mapper::toDto)
Include total count in response for frontend pagination
